mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate above 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production and decline in inflation expectations signals strong supply-side dynamics and stable monetary conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or the combined effect of INDPRO and CPIAUCSL on returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts below 1,600 thousand units signals weak demand for construction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls indicates robust labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the CPI inflation rate above 2.5% signals rising inflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of strong GDP growth and low federal funds rates indicates a favorable macroeconomic environment, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or the combined effect of GDPC1 and FEDFUNDS on returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, rising federal funds rates signal reduced liquidity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.
